objective: Train and prospectively test a fixed-PVRIG sequence-to-independent-dual-docking continuous geometry surrogate on the same design domain as the 7087-candidate competition library.
claim_boundary: V4-D predicts computational 8X6B/9E6Y docking geometry and uncertainty only. It is not a PVRIG binding probability, affinity or Kd predictor, competition result, experimental blocker label, Docking Gold release, or final submission authority.

forbidden_actions: using V1.3 G1-G5 as V3-P2 training truth

minimum_future_requirements: at least 2 biological anchors per family
at least 3 families unseen by the previous development method
binding and blocking evidence stored separately from docking geometry

v4_c_dual128.known_limitation: zero of 7087 candidates passed the frozen dual128 sequence-support gate

v4_d_fullqc290.role: prospective computational geometry surrogate in the competition design domain

full_qc_complete290_source.selection_time_policy: Full-QC hard-pass and complete AbNatiV before any V4-D independent dual-docking result exists

generic_prior_dual128_evidence.policy: weak generic binding prior baseline only; not a blocker or affinity label

remote_campaign.controls_policy: The 47 controls are repeated protocol-regression measurements only. They are never candidate training rows and never counted as new biological anchors.
remote_campaign.resource_policy: After the existing V4-C campaign reaches terminal and its evaluator is freshly aggregated, run on node23 with at most 12 concurrent HADDOCK jobs x 4 cores, targeting no more than 75 percent of 64 logical CPUs. Use node-local ext4 scratch and shared NFS only for atomic publication.

docking_protocol.missing_seed_policy: never impute a failed seed as success; report missing-seed fraction and use only observed successful seeds

pose_quality_gates: native receptor overlay RMSD at most 1.0 A
complete native and cross reference pair
continuous_teacher_definition.pvrl2_virtual_clash_policy: report separately and do not penalize because PVRL2 overlap is part of the obstruction endpoint
candidate_targets: continuous hotspot, occlusion, CDR contribution, clash, and pose-support summaries
continuous_teacher_definition.legacy_tier_policy: A/B/C/E and G1-G5 are diagnostic explanation only and never the primary or sole training label
continuous_teacher_definition.soft_tier_policy: Bootstrap tier distributions may be reported as measurement-uncertainty diagnostics but are not biological probabilities and are not the V4-D primary target

bootstrap.unit: resample successful seed-level job scores within receptor, then recompute receptor medians and candidate dual summaries

teacher_release_gate.open_release: Build labels only for OPEN_TRAIN and OPEN_DEVELOPMENT after physical candidate-ID filtering before opening raw job_result.json files.
teacher_release_gate.test_release: Do not open or compute PROSPECTIVE_COMPUTATIONAL_TEST labels until model configuration, feature schema, checkpoint hashes, open-development summary, and frozen test predictions are hash-bound to a one-shot unseal receipt.

model_development_contract.architecture_selection_uses: OPEN_TRAIN for fitting and OPEN_DEVELOPMENT for all architecture, feature, hyperparameter, ensemble, and uncertainty choices
candidate_models: frozen sequence embeddings plus two-layer ordinal/regression MLP
optional frozen residue-contact features only if the extractor and feature schema are frozen before test unseal
secondary_metrics: top-quartile recall at 25 percent docking budget
model_development_contract.uncertainty_gate: Removing the highest-uncertainty 25 percent must reduce development MAE by at least 10 percent, and highest-uncertainty-quartile MAE must be at least 1.25 times lowest-quartile MAE.

prospective_test_contract.primary_comparator: strongest frozen shortcut baseline selected without test labels
prospective_test_contract.cluster_consistency: At least 2 of 3 held-out parent clusters must have non-negative model-minus-comparator Spearman delta.
prospective_test_contract.failure_rule: A failed or equivocal test closes V4-D. Test results may not trigger threshold, architecture, feature, or split changes under the same version.
required_unseal_bindings: teacher builder and feature schema hashes

deployment_contract.unsupported_candidates: may enter uncertainty/diversity exploration only and may not enter surrogate exploitation
deployment_contract.final_submission_authority: fresh real docking, Full QC/developability, weak generic binding prior, manual pose review, and portfolio diversity
deployment_contract.deadline_fallback: Use v3_full only as a weak prior together with Full QC, uncertainty, diversity, and real docking. V4-D research continues without blocking Top50 or Top10.
